docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSMILLER, BETSY
DEFENDANT FILED A DECLARATION STATING THAT PLAINTIFF USED AN INCORRECT NAME AND CORRECT NAME IS BETSY L. JOHNSMILLER.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSMILLER, BETSY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MOHAMATH, AYSAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOHAMATH, AYSAH AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSMILLER, BETSY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-13-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-24-2006, OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO AYSAH MOHAMATH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMATH, AYSAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSMILLER, BETSY $875.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.00, THE COURT ASSESS COMPARATIVE FAULT 50% - 50% TO EACH PARTY.THE JUDGMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS A NET AWARD, BASED ON DAMAGES OF $1000.00 FOR PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE, $750.00 FOR SPECIAL AND GENERAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHNSMILLER, BETSY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MOHAMATH, AYSAH $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $235.00, THE COURT ASSESS COMPARATIVER FAULT 50% - 50% TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS A NET AWARD, BASED ON DAMAGES OF $300.00 FOR DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF MOHAMATH, AYSAH
THIS IS A SATISFACTIN OF JUDGEMENT ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSMILLER, BETSY
